name: Christmas Cookie Kringle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the hard-boiled egg yolks with the raw egg yolk using the back of a spoon.
2. Gradually add sugar, butter, shortening, cinnamon, vanilla, and grated lemon and orange rinds to the egg mixture until combined.
3. Form the dough into a ball and chill it in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
4. Roll out the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to an 1/8 inch thickness.
5. Cut out shapes using a doughnut cutter and transfer them onto a cookie sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form, then brush each shape with the beaten egg white.
7. Sprinkle with pistachios for added flavor and decoration.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 8-10 minutes or until golden brown.
9. Allow to cool completely before serving.
